title: dyssodia belenidium
intro: Dyssodia belenidium, also known as the desert marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Dyssodia belenidium include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Dyssodia belenidium can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption and application.
